extracted.title: Mainline-100 Pigging (CorinSEG), April 15-17, 2026
extracted.description:
Columbia Gulf Transmission LLC (CGT) reminds customers of upcoming pigging on Mainline-100 beginning on Wednesday, April 15, 2026, through Friday, April 17, 2026. As a result, the Backhaul capacity through CorinSEG will be reduced to 2,400,000 Dth effective Timely Cycle for Gas Day Wednesday, April 15, 2026.

CGT anticipates this restriction may result in curtailments to Interruptible, Secondary Firm, and Primary Firm services. Please see the details provided below for more information.

CorinSEG
• Estimated Capacity Setting: 2,400,000 Dth
• Design Capacity: 2,540,656 Dth
• Posted Percentage: 94%

Due to the potential impact to firm service, CGT encourages customers to monitor the scheduled volumes on the Operationally Available Capacity screen on Informational Postings, as nominations can fluctuate based on market conditions.

Reservation Charge Credits (RCCs) will be determined per the process set forth in the General Terms and Conditions, Section 40 of CGT’s FERC Gas Tariff (Tariff). By means of this notice, CGT is establishing the 7-day Average Usage Quantity to be the period of March 31 – April 6, 2026, pursuant to the provisions in the Tariff.

Please contact your Customer Services Representative with any questions.
